CONTENT.Career: Hoogma had his breakthrough in the 2016–2017 season, becoming the youngest player ever to not have missed a single minute in a full Eredivisie season, playing all 34 matches for Heracles Almelo.On 13 June 2017, 1899 Hoffenheim announced the transfer of the young prospect on a four-year contract, for an undisclosed fee.In January 2019, Hoogma joined 2. Bundesliga side FC St. Pauli on loan for the second half of the 2018–19 season.On 15 July 2021, TSG Hoffenheim announced that Hoogma was being loaned to newly promoted Bundesliga side SpVgg Greuther Fürth on a season-long loan.On 24 January 2022, Hoogma returned to his former club Heracles Almelo. He signed a contract until 2026 and will wear number 21.
CONTENT.Personal life: His father is former Dutch footballer Nico-Jan Hoogma.
CONTENT.External links: Justin Hoogma at WorldFootball.netVoetbal International profile (in Dutch)
CONTENT.Career statistics: As of matches played on 30 January 2019

SUMMARY: Justin Hoogma (born 11 June 1998) is a Dutch professional footballer who plays as a centre-back for Heracles Almelo.
